items.title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

items.title: chopratejas/headroom
items.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

items.title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
items.description: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

items.title: roboflow/supervision
items.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

items.title: huggingface/OpenEnv
items.description: An interface library for RL post training with environments.

items.title: Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
items.description: Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face running locally across platforms

items.title: Andyyyy64/whichllm
items.description: Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.

items.title: PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
items.description: Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

items.title: modelscope/FunASR
items.description: Industrial-grade speech recognition toolkit: 170x realtime, 50+ languages, speaker diarization, emotion detection, streaming, and OpenAI-compatible API.
